nasb.text: Yet He sent prophets to them to bring them back to the Lord; though they testified against them, they would not listen.

esv.text: Yet he sent prophets among them to bring them back to the Lord. These testified against them, but they would not pay attention.

cnv.text: 但耶和華仍然差派先知到他們中間，引導他們歸向耶和華；這些先知雖然警告他們，他們卻不肯聽從。

ccb.text: 但耶和华仍然派先知到他们中间，引导他们归向祂。先知警告他们，他们却不听。
